节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: This module provides the capability to manage restriction policy of the enterprise devices.
注释信息: @namespace restrictions
@syscap SystemCapability.Customization.EnterpriseDeviceManager
@since 10

节点.功能描述: Disallows the specific feature of the device. ohos.permission.ENTERPRISE_MANAGE_NETWORK The admin must have the corresponding permission. the supported device features are as follows: modifyDateTime, bluetooth, printer, hdc, microphone, fingerprint, usb, wifi, tethering, inactiveUserFreeze, camera, mtpClient, mtpServer, backupAndRestore, notification, mms, sms, remoteDiagnosis, remoteDesk, nfc, privateSpace, vpn, airplaneMode, mobileData, maintenanceMode, sambaClient, sambaServer, appClone, externalStorageCard, randomMac, unmuteDevice, hdcRemote, virtualService. but the function has not taken effect in real time. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.
注释信息: @permission ohos.permission.ENTERPRISE_MANAGE_RESTRICTIONS or ohos.permission.PERSONAL_MANAGE_RESTRICTIONS or
@param { Want } admin - admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.
@param { string } feature - feature indicates the specific feature to be disallowed or allowed,
@param { boolean } disallow - true if disallow the specific feature of device, otherwise false.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200001 - The application is not an administrator application of the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200002 - The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200013 - The enterprise management policy has been successfully set,
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - Permission verification failed.
@syscap SystemCapability.Customization.EnterpriseDeviceManager
@stagemodelonly
@since 23

parameters.说明: admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.
feature indicates the specific feature to be disallowed or allowed,
true if disallow the specific feature of device, otherwise false.

error_codes.description: The application is not an administrator application of the device.
The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
The enterprise management policy has been successfully set,
Permission verification failed.

节点.功能描述: Queries whether the specific feature of the device is disallowed. ohos.permission.ENTERPRISE_MANAGE_NETWORK If the admin is not empty, it must have the corresponding permission. the supported device features are as follows: modifyDateTime, bluetooth, printer, hdc, microphone, fingerprint, usb, wifi, tethering, inactiveUserFreeze, camera, mtpClient, mtpServer, backupAndRestore, notification, mms, sms, remoteDiagnosis, remoteDesk, nfc, privateSpace, vpn, airplaneMode, mobileData, maintenanceMode, sambaClient, sambaServer, appClone, externalStorageCard, randomMac, unmuteDevice, hdcRemote, virtualService. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.
注释信息: @permission ohos.permission.ENTERPRISE_MANAGE_RESTRICTIONS or ohos.permission.PERSONAL_MANAGE_RESTRICTIONS or
@param { Want | null } admin - admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.
@param { string } feature - feature indicates the specific feature to be queried,
@returns { boolean } true if the specific feature of device is disallowed, otherwise false.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200001 - The application is not an administrator application of the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200002 - The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - Permission verification failed.
@syscap SystemCapability.Customization.EnterpriseDeviceManager
@stagemodelonly
@since 23

parameters.说明: admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.
feature indicates the specific feature to be queried,

节点.return_description: true if the specific feature of device is disallowed, otherwise false.

error_codes.description: The application is not an administrator application of the device.
The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
Permission verification failed.

节点.功能描述: Disallows the specific feature of the device for the specified account. the supported device features are as follows: fingerprint, print, mtpClient, usbStorageDeviceWrite, diskRecoveryKey, sudo, distributedTransmissionOutgoing, openFileBoost.
注释信息: @permission ohos.permission.ENTERPRISE_MANAGE_RESTRICTIONS
@param { Want } admin - admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.
@param { string } feature - feature indicates the specific feature to be disallowed or allowed,
@param { boolean } disallow - true if disallow the specific feature of device, otherwise false.
@param { number } accountId - accountId indicates the account ID to be queried.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200001 - The application is not an administrator application of the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200002 - the administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200010 - A conflict policy has been configured.
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.
@syscap SystemCapability.Customization.EnterpriseDeviceManager
@stagemodelonly
@since 23

parameters.说明: admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.
feature indicates the specific feature to be disallowed or allowed,
true if disallow the specific feature of device, otherwise false.
accountId indicates the account ID to be queried.

error_codes.description: The application is not an administrator application of the device.
the administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
A conflict policy has been configured.
Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.

节点.功能描述: Queries whether the specific feature of the device is disallowed for the specified account. the supported device features are as follows: fingerprint, print, mtpClient, usbStorageDeviceWrite, diskRecoveryKey, sudo, distributedTransmissionOutgoing, openFileBoost.
注释信息: @permission ohos.permission.ENTERPRISE_MANAGE_RESTRICTIONS
@param { Want | null } admin - admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.
@param { string } feature - feature indicates the specific feature to be queried.
@param { number } accountId - accountId indicates the account ID to be queried.
@returns { boolean } true if the specific feature of device is disallowed, otherwise false.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200001 - The application is not an administrator application of the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200002 - the administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.
@syscap SystemCapability.Customization.EnterpriseDeviceManager
@stagemodelonly
@since 23

parameters.说明: admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.
feature indicates the specific feature to be queried.
accountId indicates the account ID to be queried.

节点.return_description: true if the specific feature of device is disallowed, otherwise false.

error_codes.description: The application is not an administrator application of the device.
the administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.

节点.功能描述: Adds applications or bundles or other contents to the list to restrict them from using a specific feature. 2. Incorrect parameter types; 3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @permission ohos.permission.ENTERPRISE_MANAGE_RESTRICTIONS
@param { Want } admin - admin indicates the administrator ability information.
@param { string } feature - feature indicates the specific feature to be disallowed.
@param { Array<string> } list - list of restricted applications or bundles or other contents.
@param { number } accountId - indicates the account ID.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200001 - The application is not an administrator application of the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200002 - The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;
@syscap SystemCapability.Customization.EnterpriseDeviceManager
@stagemodelonly
@since 14

parameters.说明: admin indicates the administrator ability information.
feature indicates the specific feature to be disallowed.
list of restricted applications or bundles or other contents.
indicates the account ID.

error_codes.description: The application is not an administrator application of the device.
The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.
Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;

节点.功能描述: Removes applications or bundles or other contents from the list to unblock them from using a specific feature. 2. Incorrect parameter types; 3. Parameter verification failed.

@param { Want } admin - admin indicates the administrator ability information.
@param { string } feature - feature indicates the specific feature to be disallowed.
@param { Array<string> } list - list of unblock applications or bundles or other contents.
@param { number } accountId - indicates the account ID.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200001 - The application is not an administrator application of the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200002 - The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;
@syscap SystemCapability.Customization.EnterpriseDeviceManager
@stagemodelonly
@since 14

parameters.说明: admin indicates the administrator ability information.
feature indicates the specific feature to be disallowed.
list of unblock applications or bundles or other contents.
indicates the account ID.

error_codes.description: The application is not an administrator application of the device.
The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.
Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;

节点.功能描述: Gets the list of applications or bundles or other contents that are restrict from using a specific feature. 2. Incorrect parameter types; 3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @permission ohos.permission.ENTERPRISE_MANAGE_RESTRICTIONS

@param { string } feature - feature indicates the specific feature to be disallowed.
@param { number } accountId - indicates the account ID.
@returns { Array<string> } list - list of applications or bundles or other contents.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200001 - The application is not an administrator application of the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200002 - The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;
@syscap SystemCapability.Customization.EnterpriseDeviceManager
@stagemodelonly
@since 14

parameters.说明: admin indicates the administrator ability information.
feature indicates the specific feature to be disallowed.
indicates the account ID.

节点.return_description: list - list of applications or bundles or other contents.

error_codes.description: The application is not an administrator application of the device.

节点.功能描述: Restricting users from changing specified settings item on the device. the supported settingsItems are as follows: setEthernetIp, setApn, powerKeyShutdown, setDeviceName, setBiometricsAndScreenLock.
注释信息: @permission ohos.permission.ENTERPRISE_SET_USER_RESTRICTION
@param { Want } admin - admin indicates the administrator ability information.
@param { string } settingsItem - settingsItem indicates the specific settings item to be disallowed.
@param { boolean } restricted - true if restrict the specific settings item of device, otherwise false.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200001 - The application is not an administrator application of the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200002 - The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.
@syscap SystemCapability.Customization.EnterpriseDeviceManager
@stagemodelonly
@since 20

parameters.说明: admin indicates the administrator ability information.
settingsItem indicates the specific settings item to be disallowed.
true if restrict the specific settings item of device, otherwise false.

error_codes.description: The application is not an administrator application of the device.
The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.

@param { string } settingsItem - settingsItem indicates the specific settings item to be disallowed.

@throws { BusinessError } 9200002 - The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.

@stagemodelonly
@since 20

settingsItem indicates the specific settings item to be disallowed.

节点.return_description: true if restrict the specific settings item of device, otherwise false.

error_codes.description: The application is not an administrator application of the device.
The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.

节点.功能描述: Restricting users from changing specified settings item for account on the device. the supported settingsItems are as follows: modifyWallpaper. The application does not have the permission required to call the API. Failed to call the API due to limited device capabilities.
注释信息: @permission ohos.permission.ENTERPRISE_SET_USER_RESTRICTION
@param { Want } admin - admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.
@param { string } settingsItem - settingsItem indicates the specific settings item to be disallowed.
@param { number } accountId - accountId indicates the account ID to be restricted.
@param { boolean } restricted - true if restrict the specific settings item of device, otherwise false.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200001 - The application is not an administrator application of the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200002 - The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - Permission verification failed.
@throws { BusinessError } 801 - Capability not supported.
@syscap SystemCapability.Customization.EnterpriseDeviceManager
@stagemodelonly
@since 23

parameters.说明: admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.
settingsItem indicates the specific settings item to be disallowed.
accountId indicates the account ID to be restricted.
true if restrict the specific settings item of device, otherwise false.

error_codes.description: The application is not an administrator application of the device.
The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
Permission verification failed.
Capability not supported.
